code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("YES")
    Ok(())
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    let n = parts.len()
    if n <= 1
      println("YES")
      Ok(())
    else
      mut sorted = true
      mut i = 1
      mut prev_opt = parts.get(0)
      let first_str = match prev_opt
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      mut prev = match string.parse_int(first_str)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end

      while i < n
        let cur_str = match parts.get(i)
        when Some(s)
          s
        when None
          ""
        end
        let cur = match string.parse_int(cur_str)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if cur < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = cur
        i = i + 1
      end

      if sorted
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
      Ok(())
    end
  end
end
